ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #1234567890 has been shipped
ham.body:
Hello Ravi,

We are excited to let you know that your order #1234567890 has been shipped and is on its way! Your items will reach you within 3-5 business days.

Order Details:
• 1x Echo Dot (3rd Gen) – ₹3,999
• 1x Kindle Paperwhite – ₹7,499

Tracking Number: TRK1234567890
You can track your package using the following link: <URL>

If you have any questions, feel free to contact our customer support.

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Ticket #IT-12345 - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Rohan,

Your IT helpdesk ticket #IT-12345 has been escalated to our senior team. We have detected that your account has been flagged for security reasons and requires immediate verification. Please click the link below to confirm your credentials and avoid any service interruption.

<URL>

If you do not take action within 24 hours, your account will be locked.

Kripya turant action lein.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Helpdesk Team
